security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Malicious actors can manipulate votes without proper validation.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system lacks input validation for vote manipulation.

assumptions: The governance contract does not validate vote data for integrity.
The actor can submit arbitrary vote data through the interface.

mitigation.strategy: Implement robust input validation and data integrity checks for vote messages.

description: An attacker may manipulate vote data to influence the outcome of governance proposals.

security_gap.gap_description: The system does not provide mechanisms to verify the authenticity of votes.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Lack of audit trail for vote casting.

assumptions: The system does not record an immutable audit trail of vote submissions.
Actors can cast votes anonymously or pseudonomously without linking them to their identity.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a robust audit trail to track vote submissions and ensure accountability.

description: An attacker may cast votes and deny their participation, making it difficult to hold them accountable.

security_gap.gap_description: Votes are not encrypted during transmission.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Sensitive voting data is exposed during transmission.

assumptions: Vote messages are transmitted in plain text.

mitigation.strategy: Encrypt vote messages during transmission and storage.

description: An attacker may intercept vote messages and gain access to sensitive voting data.
